text: /ci5 1 小さなダーカーがたくさん……！

/ci1 2 ああ、そいつには気を付けた方がいい。
こちらに抱きつき、自爆してくる
なかなか滑稽なダーカーさ。
/ci5 1 The area's swarming with little Falspawn...

/ci1 2 Yeah. I suggest you keep your wits
about you. They're quaint little Falspawn that
like to latch onto things and self-destruct.
